nodes.title: Image caption
widgets_values: A candid, spontaneous selfie of a stunning young white woman standing on the top of the Eiffel tower at golden hour, dressed in a red dress and wearing golden earrings that catch the warm sunlight. Her long brown frames her glowing skin naturally, illuminated by the soft last rays of the sun. The blurred city of Paris behind her fade gently into an orange-toned twilight sky. The image features authentic skin texture with subtle highlights and natural shadows, casual framing with a slight tilt capturing the intimate and effortless moment. The overall lighting and ambience reflect typical warm, natural light of an iPhone photo, making the scene feel genuine and elegantly powerful.
->Activate TXT GRAIN to enable film grain to add more realism

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: An ultra-detailed oil painting of a marble bust of a stoic Roman emperor in the style of Bernini. The statue is flawlessly carved, but the right side of its face is corrupted by a 3D glitch. Crystalline, geometric shards in iridescent and chrome colors erupt from the marble, deforming the stoic expression into a silent scream. The background is a dark, velvet void, focusing all attention on the clash between classical perfection and digital decay.
->Activate IMG2IMG SHARP to enable sharpening to add more details

nodes.title: To make it easier to see, go to settings --> Lite Graph --> Graph/ Link Render Mode --> Straight
CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A hyper-realistic cinematic scene of a large, scruffy rat mid-air, leaping from the edge of a tall building at night. Its fur is wet, messy, and illuminated by neon lights from the city below. The rat’s eyes are wide and unhinged, with a wild, schizophrenic energy. It holds a small pistol in its tiny paws, firing mid-jump ,towards the camera, with muzzle flash lighting its face. The background shows blurred skyscrapers in the dark night sky, rain falling heavily, and dramatic depth of field. Ultra-detailed textures, dynamic motion blur, and intense lighting for maximum realism.

Desaturated Colors,

A languid young woman, her sun-kissed skin a radiant warm beige, and her long, loose blonde hair a vibrant golden hue, wearing a flowing, diaphanous hippie dress in shades of burnt orange and turquoise, sits on a lush green meadow, surrounded by the vibrant colors and textures of a bohemian campsite, the warm daylight of a late morning casting a golden glow over the scene. The soft focus of a 35mm lens and a slightly grainy film texture evoke a sense of nostalgia and timelessness, while the vibrant colors and lush greenery of the meadow create a sense of joy and freedom.
